critical_findings.title: initSkillInjection() never called from plugin startup
critical_findings.detail: The plugin imports resolveDefaultAgent but not initSkillInjection. cachedConfig is always null. The entire skill injection system is dormant.
critical_findings.fix_requires: Add initSkillInjection(directory) call in opencode-plugin.ts before any resolveSkillBundle usage

critical_findings.title: config/skill-injection.json does not exist
critical_findings.detail: The config/ directory doesn't exist. Fallback defaults in buildDefaultConfig() would handle this but are never invoked.
critical_findings.fix_requires: Either create the config file or ensure the fallback path is exercised via initSkillInjection()

critical_findings.title: Agent config skill permissions mismatch injection bundles
critical_findings.detail: Agent .md files define skill: permissions that don't align with what the injection system would inject. Agent-role-boundary and use-hivemind-context-integrity are in configs but not injection bundles. Clean-code, refactor, context-map, hivemind-research are in bundles but not configs.
critical_findings.fix_requires: Reconcile agent config skill permissions with injection config bundles

critical_findings.title: hm-init tool is a placeholder
critical_findings.detail: Tool detects project state and returns proposed changes but never writes. context.ask() is unused. No reference to config-groups, schema types, or initSkillInjection.
critical_findings.fix_requires: Implement actual bootstrap logic or clearly mark as advisory-only

critical_findings.title: hm-doctor tool is a placeholder
critical_findings.detail: Only does existsSync checks. Does not call validateSkillNames(), check paths.ts, or cross-reference agent configs.
critical_findings.fix_requires: Wire doctor to validateSkillNames(), paths.ts, and config-groups.ts

critical_findings.title: hm-setting validates but never applies
critical_findings.detail: Tool correctly imports and uses config-groups for validation. But applyConfigUpdate() is dead code — never called. context.ask() unused.
critical_findings.fix_requires: Wire applyConfigUpdate and context.ask() for actual writes

PARTIAL — only resolveDefaultAgent imported, not initSkillInjection

flow_5.messages-transform-adapter.ts → skill-ex: VALID call signature (3 args, optional 4th param)

broken_links.impact: Would use fallback defaults if called; currently irrelevant because init never runs
Doctor cannot detect skill name mismatches
Config changes validated but never applied
